name: Mitsuchi Corporation
summary: Mitsuchi Corporation manufactures, delivers, and sells fasteners for automobiles in Japan. The company offers cold-forged products, including deformation, gear processing, hole machining, gear processing, hole and gear processing, and forming and forgings. It also provides assembly products for window regulators and rear-door locks; and quick nuts and nutters, and quick joints. The company was formerly known as Mitsuchi Byora Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Mitsuchi Corporation in February 1975. Mitsuchi Corporation was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Kasugai, Japan.
